channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: With Fed Set to Meet Next Week, December's Rate Cut Now Looks Questionable
item.description: Six months ago, Federal Reserve officials were divided over a third consecutive rate cut. The rate cutters prevailed, but now December's cut is uncertain.

item.title: Anthropic says Mythos can turn software patches into exploits in minutes
item.description: Anthropic's Mythos Preview can now convert newly disclosed software vulnerabilities into working exploits in hours instead of weeks, according to new Ant...

item.title: Trump calls on Israel and Iran to "immediately stop shooting" as ceasefire frays
item.description: President Trump urged Israel and Iran to "immediately stop shooting" in a Truth Social post on Monday. Why it matters: The war between Israel a...

item.title: AI is masking America's "post-literate" workforce
item.description: Millions of working Americans struggle with functional literacy, and artificial intelligence may be helping conceal it. Why it matters: Low literac...
